item.title: MIUI OS3.0.5.0.WBOEUXM Fastboot update for Redmi 15 / POCO M7 EEA
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi 15 / POCO M7 EEA

Codename: creek

Version: OS3.0.5.0.WBOEUXM | 16.0

Size: 7.7 GB

MD5: 1a0e3e5326cccb9f967ac309be59dbe5

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.
